title: Hawksbill A4 Pastel Card 225GSM Pastel Coloured Card 50 Pack
features: Premium Thick Cardstock: 225 GSM A4 pastel card provides a durable, smooth finish for neat handwriting and precision crafting.
Soft Pastel Colours: 50 sheets in gentle pastel tones inspire creativity for arts, crafts, and DIY projects.
Perfect for Kids’ Crafts: Ideal for making cards, decorations, and creative projects—supervised cutting recommended for younger children.
Versatile Art Medium: Works beautifully with pencils, markers, acrylics, watercolours, pastels, gel pens, and calligraphy inks.
School & Office Ready: Great for attention-grabbing noticeboards, brainstorming, and collaborative projects.
Trusted Quality Brand: Hawksbill Paper, FSC-accredited, with over 90 years of paper trade excellence.
